data.body: CHECKPOINT 3 (Steps 6-7): Ran 'env -u CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT bash tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh'. Result: PASSED 8, FAILED 1. RED test confirmed: test_brainstorm_gate_allowlisted_skill_allows (expected exit 0, got 2) — hook has no allowlist logic. Tests (b) and (c) pass correctly: unknown skill and no context both block as expected. AC verify commands: grep -q 'allowlist|bypass|skill.*context' → satisfied; grep -q 'allowlist.*allow|bypass.*allow|skill.*allow' → satisfied (test name 'allowlisted_skill_allows'); grep -q 'non.*allowlist|unknown.*skill|block' → satisfied ('unknown_skill_blocks'). FAIL in output → satisfied.
